examples: In our own species, limbic damage is closely related to sociopathic behaviour.
The fact that the subjects themselves had no sociopathic tendencies limits the value of the findings.
Sue was plying the sociopathic trade of getting Lucy to pity her for the very things she did to mess up Lucy's life.
"The people who do use these weapons are often the most dangerous or most sociopathic, " Pollack said.
What the Brazilians didn't know was that the African bees were sociopathic.
